name: Poppin' Fresh Barbe Cups
keywords: breads cheese main dish meats sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 1 8-oz tube of store bought biscuits or your favorite 12 biscuit recipe.
2. Use store-bought sauce or your favorite barbecue sauce recipe.
3. In a skillet, brown the ground beef and drain off excess fat.
4. Add the barbecue sauce, onion, and brown sugar to the skillet; set aside.
5. Separate the biscuit dough into 12 pieces. Place one piece in each of 12 ungreased muffin cups and press the dough up the sides to the edge of the cup.
6. Spoon the mixture into the muffin cups and sprinkle with shredded Cheddar cheese.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees F for 12 minutes.
VARIATIONS:
Use 1 13-oz can of chili beans or baked beans, and frankfurters or hot dogs cut into pieces in place of the meat mixture. Add green bell pepper or a hot pepper to the recipe for good results.
